arjun.text: Welcome to Base Camp. Read the room today — every conversation is a data point.
Route call at 15:00. I want your read before I lock it in.
Good work at the debrief. Rest. Day 2 is longer.

maya.text: Watch how you're breathing. Slow in, slow out. Even at Base Camp.
Hydration log is on the medical tent clipboard if you're doing rounds later.
Sleep well tonight. That's a medical order.

tenzin.text: The mountain is old. We are guests. Move like one.
Every kilo you carry, you also carry down. Remember that.

priya.text: Adding you to the manifest as Coordinator — Junior Grade. Welcome to the team.
Supply loads for Day 2 will be posted on the Feed by 06:00 tomorrow.

arjun.text: Base Camp behind us. From here, discipline decides how far we get.
Nice read at the debrief tonight. Sleep is a weapon — use it.

maya.text: Watch for headaches at Camp I. Tell me. Don't tough it out.
SpO₂ looked good on your check. You're adapting well.

tenzin.text: The Icefall respects patience. Nothing else.
Tomorrow is the summit push. Rest is the plan.

priya.text: Oxygen manifest updated. Two cylinders moved to summit reserve.
Radio check at 20:00. Comms hub tent, don't be late.

arjun.text: This is the day we've prepared for. Trust the process.
Summit is only halfway. Descent is where we finish the job.

maya.text: Watch every teammate. Above 8,000 m, judgment goes before the body does.
Everyone stable. That's the number that matters today.

tenzin.text: One step, one breath. Match my pace.
The mountain gave us a window. Now we bring the team home.

priya.text: Comms will hold live through the summit push. I've got you.
Debrief at 14:00. This one will feel different.
